caption: The video features a presentation at EuroPython 2018 in Edinburgh, held from July 23 to 29, 2018. The speaker, dressed in a suit and standing behind a podium, is addressing an audience while gesturing with his right hand. The screen behind him displays a slide titled "THE BIG PICTURE," which includes links to code and slides available on GitHub. The code link directs viewers to a repository named "crypto-ml" by the user "axsauze," and the slides link points to another repository named "industrial-airflow." The background of the slide is a network of interconnected nodes, symbolizing data or technology themes. The setting suggests a professional and technical conference environment focused on Python programming and related technologies.
